Notice Of Motion And Motion For Determination Of Good Faith Settlement
Off Calendar May-03-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

INTERVENOR PACIFIC UNION INTERNATIONAL, INC., DANA LEE's Motion For Determination Of Good Faith Settlement.

GRANTED. No opposition filed. Prevailing party is to submit a proposed order that is verbatim to the Courts ruling.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Clerk: W. Trupek, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano CSR# 8600, email: maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/RBU)

MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
